pandoc 
  to: latex
  output-file: cabecera.tex
  standalone: true
  shift-heading-level-by: -1
  pdf-engine: xelatex
  variables:
    graphics: true
    tables: true
  default-image-extension: pdf
  toc: true
  toc-depth: 4
  number-sections: true
  
metadata

documentclass: scrreprt
  classoption:
    - DIV=11
    - numbers=noendperiod
  papersize: A4
  header-includes:
    - '\KOMAoption{captions}{tableheading}'
  block-headings: true
  title: Vigilancia de Eventos Adversos posteriores a la vacunación contra el COVID-19 en Ecuador Periodo de reporte  `r params$mes` - `r params$anio`
  crossref:
    lof-title: Lista de Figuras
    lot-title: Lista de Tablas
    fig-title: Figura
    tbl-title: Tabla
  lang: es
  bibliography:
    - bibliografia_esavi.bib
  csl: din-1505-2-numeric.csl
  toc-title: Tabla de contenidos
  colorlinks: true
  lot: true
  lof: true
